mapper.select: SELECT bc.minor_name FROM business b LEFT JOIN business_class bc ON b.business_class_id = bc.business_class_id WHERE b.business_id = #{businessId}
mapper.update: UPDATE business SET business_code = #{dto.businessCode}, business_nm = #{dto.businessNm}, business_open_date = #{dto.businessOpenDate}, business_addr = #{dto.businessAddr}, business_addr_detail = #{dto.businessAddrDetail}, business_class_id = #{dto.businessClassId} WHERE business_id = #{businessId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.business_id, b.business_class_id, b.business_nm, b.business_addr, b.business_addr_detail, b.business_code, b.business_open_date, bc.major_name AS businessClassMajorName, bc.middle_name AS businessClassMiddleName, bc.minor_name AS businessClassMinorName FROM business b LEFT JOIN business_class bc ON b.business_class_id = bc.business_class_id WHERE b.member_id = #{memberId}
